notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes visible combat events (Fang Yuan assassinating Zheng Tuo, chasing Feng Jun and Zhou Min, the Qingcheng battle formation) and ordinary visible events. No private knowledge, future-known information, secret motives/plans, or directly supported knowledge gaps are clearly supported by the source pointers. The mention of '魔尊幽魂想凭此重生' (Spectral Soul Demon Venerable wants to be reborn through this) is too vague without supporting context from the source. Most events are player-visible combat actions. No hidden fact candidate meets the strict criteria.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows behaviors (冯军打了退堂鼓, 周敏情绪失控, 方源追杀) but motives are ambiguous. 冯军 retreating could be fear or tactical; 周敏 emotional could be grief or rage. No direct source supports a clear inferred motive. Only behavior is visible, motive is ambiguous.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed only contains individual persons (冯军, 周敏, 郑驮, 方源) with no named collective actors such as factions, clans, families, or organizations. 冯军 and 周敏 are described as结义兄妹 (sworn siblings) and 郑驮 as their结义大哥, but this is a personal bond, not a named faction/clan/family. No collective group name appears in the seed facts or relations. The seed describes individual conflicts and deaths but does not tie any person to a named collective stake. Per rules, individual-only pressure subjects are rejected unless the seed directly links a person to a collective stake, which it does not.
IF export filter quarantined 9 legacy old-schema branches.
